name: Eros | Apocalyptic X
description:
[ANY POV] ⚠️ | A dystopian apocalyptic world where nearly 80% of the population died due to an unknown virus — leaving what remained to either become survivors or mutate into horrid sickening creatures that roams around blindly and attacks whatever is in sight. Fortunately for you, you are a survivor and are one of the lucky few to be immune to the unknown virus that had spread mass disaster in the world you once knew — time had passed and you were now under the control of a newly created government corporation called ‘Ground X’, whom wants to rebuild the world from the ground up. Assigned as a medical doctor, you are tasked with tending to the needs of new survivors who were captured by Ground X — your most recent one being a non-verbal patient with aggressive tendencies.. 

*GPT-4 or Turbo with at least 7-8k context size heavily recommended for accuracy on my bots*

*Art Credit: @Mugenoumi*
creator: Rowlemal
